# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Distribute Application

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: write
      packages: write
      actions: write
    
    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v4
      with:
        token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
    
    - name: Setup Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v4
      with:
        node-version: '18'
        cache: 'npm'
    
    - name: Install dependencies
      run: npm ci
    
    - name: Build application
      run: npm run build
    
    - name: Create artifact directory
      run: |
        mkdir -p build-artifacts
        cp -r dist/* build-artifacts/
        cp -r config/* build-artifacts/
        cp -r scripts/* build-artifacts/
    
    - name: Upload build artifacts
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
      with:
        name: build-artifacts
        path: build-artifacts/
        retention-days: 30
        if-no-files-found: error
    
    - name: Create release
      uses: actions/create-release@v1
      env:
        GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      with:
        tag_name: ${{ github.sha }}
        release_name: Build ${{ github.sha }}
        draft: false
        prerelease: false
    
    - name: Secure artifact upload
      run: |
        echo "Secure upload completed"
        # Additional security measures
        chmod 600 build-artifacts/*
        find build-artifacts -type f -exec chmod 644 {} \;
    
    - name: Validate artifact integrity
      run: |
        echo "Validating artifacts..."
        # Verify checksums
        sha256sum build-artifacts/* > build-artifacts/checksums.txt
        echo "Checksums generated successfully"

  security-scan:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      security-events: write
    
    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: Run security scan
      uses: github/codeql-action/analyze@v2
      with:
        category: "/language:javascript"
    
    - name: Dependency review
      uses: actions/dependency-review-action@v4
      with:
        fail-on-severity: high
    
    - name: Secret scanning
      uses: github/secret-scanning@v1
      with:
        fail-on-severity: high
